THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARROYO, DORELL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 JONES STREET #414, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94102 $1,995.20 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,995.20, IT IS ORDERED THAT THE SUM OF 1995.20 TO BE PAID ONLY IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO SURRENDER POSSESSION BY 5PM 9/6/13. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides Center is present. Represented by Georgette Lovett.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Dorrell Arroyo is present.
Attorney Doan Nguyen representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Elan Lambert , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of June 24, 2013 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
